---
name: Source correction
about: A citation is wrong, a URL is dead, or an evidence grade is misassigned
title: "[source] "
labels: source-correction
---

## Source

**source_id:**
**Title as recorded:**
**Where it is cited:** <!-- files and, if you can, line numbers -->

## Problem

- [ ] URL no longer resolves
- [ ] Author list, title, venue, or year is wrong
- [ ] DOI is missing or incorrect
- [ ] Cited as a preprint when a peer-reviewed version exists
- [ ] Evidence grade is misassigned
- [ ] The claim in the prose is not supported by the source
- [ ] A better primary source exists for the same claim
- [ ] The source is of an excluded type: an AI-generated summary, a search snippet, or a blog post where a paper exists

**Corrected fields:**
**Proposed evidence grade and the rule from the source quality framework that supports it:**
